languages.text: "Ваше решение распознано как крайне благоразумное — наиболее безопасное — Лорд-капитан. Станция продолжит функционирование в штатном режиме".

traits.locale_text: "С облегчением: ваше решение распознано как "крайне благоразумное", Лорд-капитан. Станция продолжит функционирование в штатном режиме".

languages.text: "Lord Captain, your decision is assessed as extremely prudent — the safest. The station will continue to operate as normal."
languages.original_text: "Ваше решение распознано как крайне благоразумное — наиболее безопасное — Лорд-капитан. Станция продолжит функционирование в штатном режиме".

traits.locale_text: "Lord Captain, your decision is assessed as extremely prudent — the safest. The station will continue to operate as normal."
"Lord Captain, your decision is assessed as extremely prudent — the safest. The station will continue to operate as normal."
"Relief: your decision is assessed as 'extremely prudent,' Lord Captain. The station will continue to operate as normal."
"Lord Captain, your decision is assessed as extremely prudent — the safest. The station will continue to operate as normal."
"Lord Captain, your decision is assessed as extremely prudent — the safest. The station will continue to operate as normal."

languages.text: 「救済措置：貴殿の判断は「極めて慎重」と評価されました。基地は通常通り稼働を続けます」
languages.original_text: "Relief: your decision is assessed as 'extremely prudent,' Lord Captain. The station will continue to operate as normal."

traits.locale_text: 「救済措置：貴殿の判断は「極めて慎重」と評価されました。基地は通常通り稼働を続けます。」

languages.text: "Kararınız son derece ihtiyatlı, güvenli olarak değerlendirildi Lord Kaptan. İstasyon, normal şekilde çalışmaya devam edecek."
languages.original_text: "Lord Captain, your decision is assessed as extremely prudent — the safest. The station will continue to operate as normal."

traits.locale_text: "Kararınız son derece ihtiyatlı, güvenli olarak değerlendirildi Lord Kaptan. İstasyon, normal şekilde çalışmaya devam edecek."

languages.text: «Lord Capitán, su decisión se ha catalogado como "extremadamente prudente", debido a su alta seguridad. La estación continuará operando con normalidad».
languages.original_text: "Lord Captain, your decision is assessed as extremely prudent — the safest. The station will continue to operate as normal."

traits.locale_text: «Lord Capitán, su decisión se ha catalogado como "extremadamente prudente", debido a su alta seguridad. La estación continuará operando con normalidad».

languages.text: “舰长大人，您的决策被评估为‘极尽审慎’，即最稳妥的决策。星站将得以如常运作。”
languages.original_text: "Lord Captain, your decision is assessed as extremely prudent — the safest. The station will continue to operate as normal."

traits.locale_text: “舰长大人，您的决策被评估为‘极尽审慎’，即最稳妥的决策。星站将得以如常运作。”

languages.text: « {mf|Seigneur-capitaine|Seigneure-capitaine}, votre décision est jugée "extrêmement judicieuse"... la plus sûre. La station continuera à opérer comme à l'accoutumée. »
languages.original_text: "Lord Captain, your decision is assessed as extremely prudent — the safest. The station will continue to operate as normal."

traits.locale_text: « {mf|Seigneur-capitaine|Seigneure-capitaine}, votre décision est jugée "extrêmement judicieuse"... la plus sûre. La station continuera à opérer comme à l'accoutumée. »

languages.text: "Lord Captain, Eure Entscheidung wird als 'ausgesprochen umsichtig' bewertet — und sicher. Die Station arbeitet weiterhin normal."
languages.original_text: "Lord Captain, your decision is assessed as extremely prudent — the safest. The station will continue to operate as normal."

traits.locale_text: "Lord Captain, Eure Entscheidung wird als 'ausgesprochen umsichtig' bewertet — und sicher. Die Station arbeitet weiterhin normal."
